_comment: Edit this to change what the weekly brief researches. Each entry becomes one last30days query. Keep to 5 topics — more = expensive + noisy. Each topic should be a sharp, specific phrase.

topics.query: new AI coding tools, IDE agents, and developer assistants launched or trending in the last week
new open-source Claude skills, agent skills, or Cursor skills published on GitHub in the last week
new AI agents, agent frameworks, or notable agent demos released or discussed in the last week
new AI infrastructure, model launches, inference tools, or MCP servers worth knowing about this week
AI strategy moves by VC firms and venture studios, plus notable AI portfolio company news this week
